_comment: 역할 초상화 아이콘 27장. Taisho Roman 스타일 (home_bg_prompts.json과 동일). voice_map.json의 원신 보이스 캐릭터 시각 특징을 역할 기능과 결합. 1024x1024 원형 메달리온 초상화.
style_prefix: Taisho Roman art nouveau illustration, ornate decorative frame border with cherry blossoms and vines, Japanese dark fantasy aesthetic, vertical portrait composition,
style_suffix: , art nouveau ornamental details, sakura petals, moonlit atmosphere, muted indigo and silver palette, masterpiece, best quality

items.title: 늑대인간
items.prompt: middle-aged adult male wolf with black fur and graying muzzle, fierce yellow eyes glowing in shadow, fangs revealed in a snarl, dignified seasoned predator, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, moonlit night

items.title: 예언자
items.prompt: wise mature middle-aged woman with silver-streaked hair elegantly tied up, dignified serene expression showing sagely wisdom, holding a glowing bronze mirror revealing a wolf silhouette, jade ornaments and flowing robes, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, mystical atmosphere

items.title: 강도
items.prompt: sharp androgynous-looking woman in her twenties with short dark hair and piercing neutral gaze, slender unisex figure in dark tailored attire, caught mid-swap of two wooden tablets, sly knowing expression, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, moonlit alley backdrop

items.title: 하수인
items.prompt: sharp-featured human man with piercing calculating eyes and arrogant smirk revealing wolf fangs between his lips, elegant dark coat, human face with lupine teeth, kneeling before a wolf banner giving a discreet thumbs-up signal, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 프리메이슨
items.prompt: strong soldier-like man with broad shoulders and disciplined stoic expression, rugged masculine face, military-style Taisho uniform, square-and-compass pendant visible on chest, secret handshake gesture toward a mirrored twin reflection, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, candlelit shrine

items.title: 말썽쟁이
items.prompt: tiny floating pixie-like figure with platinum white twin ponytails, star-shaped cape clasp, oversized expressive eyes, mischievous grin pulling two wooden tablets apart mid-air, sparkling stardust trail, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 무두장이
items.prompt: young man in his twenties with pastel pink hair, feminine makeup with eyeliner and glossy lipstick, flamboyant ruffled collar, androgynous beauty, theatrical melancholy expression with a single tear, red rose in hand, tragic romantic silhouette, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, dark velvet backdrop

items.title: 주정뱅이
items.prompt: jolly chef with apron and cleaver tucked in sash, flushed red cheeks, sake gourd in one hand, eyes closed grabbing a face-down wooden tablet blindly, warm drunken smile, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, lantern-lit kitchen

items.title: 사냥꾼
items.prompt: rugged bearded man in his thirties with weathered tanned skin and steely focused eyes, archer drawing a bow with arrow nocked ready to fire, leather hunting garb over Taisho civilian attire, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, misty forest backdrop

items.title: 불면증환자
items.prompt: young teenage girl with cautious tired expression and dark circles under bloodshot eyes, sickly pale complexion, slightly disheveled hair, clutching her own wooden tablet nervously, fragile and exhausted, in the final hour before dawn, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, dim bedroom

items.title: 태초의 늑대인간
items.prompt: ancient elder male wolf with pure snow-white fur and silver whiskers, wise aged golden eyes, regal grey grandfather patriarch with long muzzle, one clawed paw on a wooden tablet swapping with a center tablet, venerable authoritative presence, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 신비한 늑대인간
items.prompt: sleek flame-red-furred adult female wolf in a highly seductive alluring pose, lying on her side in a sultry reclining position with one paw languidly draped over a face-down tablet, half-lidded bedroom amber eyes gazing suggestively at the viewer, long crimson fur flowing voluptuously, thirty-something sensual feminine aura, exposed soft belly and graceful arched neck, tempting seductress vibe, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 잠자는 늑대인간
items.prompt: elderly brown-furred female grandmother wolf with greying silver-tipped muzzle, peaceful sleeping pose with closed eyes and calm aged expression, wise old grandma beast, dreaming of a distant wolf pack in a thought-bubble cloud, passive tranquil aura, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 견습 예언자
items.prompt: teenage magical girl with round glasses and medium-length hair, cute magical girl uniform with star and moon motifs, small magical wand in one hand, curious wide-eyed wonder, peeking at a single center wooden tablet with a glowing crystal shard, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 심령 수사관
items.prompt: professional-looking woman in her twenties with sharp business demeanor, tailored Taisho vest blazer and high collar, neat shoulder-length hair, magnifying glass in one hand examining two face-up tablets for supernatural traces, poised analytical expression, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 마녀
items.prompt: disheveled thirty-something woman with wild messy frizzy hair and unhinged crazed wide eyes, manic frenzied expression, stirring a small black cauldron frantically, holding a center wooden tablet over the steam, purple-green magic smoke swirling chaotically, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 동네 얼간이
items.prompt: chubby late-teenage boy around eighteen or nineteen years old with silly bowl-cut short haircut, round plump face with subtle peach fuzz, happily stuffing his face with food, holding a large steamed bun or rice ball in both hands and taking a huge bite, cheeks bulging with food, crumbs on his chin and around his mouth, blissful dimwit expression while eating, greasy fingers, gluttonous comedic energy, other foods scattered around, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 계시자
items.prompt: early-twenties young woman with the fresh look of a university student or new office employee, tidy shoulder-length neat hair, modest Taisho blouse and vest, earnest determined expression, dramatically flipping a player's wooden tablet face-up, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 영기 예언자
items.prompt: gentle healer with blonde twin-drill curls, white-and-blue deaconess outfit, both hands glowing with soft hydro energy, sensing colorful ki trails left by night movers in the air, radiant soft light, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 왕자
items.prompt: young upright male student in his twenties, clean-cut neat appearance with tidy dark hair, confident princely posture in elegant regal school-uniform-style robes, slight silver circlet on head, noble bearing, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, palace throne behind

items.title: 저주받은 사람
items.prompt: thirty-something woman with tear-streaked smeared black makeup running down her face, wary tense fearful alert expression, thorny vines binding the neck, glowing crimson cursed mark spreading across her skin, trembling on edge, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 견습 무두장이
items.prompt: thin-faced gaunt teenage boy with hollow cheeks, only subtle lip makeup (just lipstick, no full face paint), apprentice in patchwork dark robes, wistful melancholic gaze, skinny angular features, shadow of the master tanner looming behind, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 어떤것
items.prompt: thirty-something adult man wearing a white surgical medical face mask covering only the lower half of his face (mouth and nose) like the kind worn at hospitals, his eyes and forehead clearly visible above the mask, middle-aged stocky build in dark Taisho attire, pale hand reaching out to tap the shoulders of two unseen neighbors, unsettling masked stranger presence, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 종자
items.prompt: ordinary plain-looking young human man with an average unremarkable face (smooth human skin, no fur, no muzzle, entirely human facial features, not handsome, not sharp, just regular everyday appearance), simple short dark hair, modest earnest expression of a common footman, only his ears are pointed wolf ears rising from the top of his head (wolf ears only, otherwise completely human and plain), simple Taisho-era squire attendant uniform without flashy decoration, giving a discreet thumbs-up signal, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 주시자
items.prompt: old grandfather man with long white beard and thick round heavy eyeglasses, scholarly aged robes, peeking from behind an ornate folding screen byeongpung, keen magnified observant eyes behind the lenses, protective silvery aura extending toward a seer silhouette in front, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame, candlelit shrine

items.title: 도플갱어
items.prompt: ditzy cheerful middle-aged woman with apron and braided hair, rosy round cheeks and bubbly carefree smile, absent-minded ditzy charm, but an antique mirror beside her reflects a terrifyingly sinister evil version of herself with twisted malicious grin, glowing menacing red eyes, fanged teeth, dark shadowy aura, vicious wicked expression, the mirror reflection is truly horrifying and wicked while her real face remains innocently oblivious, shapeshifting swirl between the two contrasting faces, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame

items.title: 마을주민
items.prompt: ordinary young woman in her twenties with simple Taisho civilian hanten attire, medium-length brown hair, kind unassuming gentle smile, plain everyday appearance, holding a small paper lantern, peaceful village night, close-up bust portrait, circular medallion frame
